label: Data analytics by size class of enterprise

size_emp.label: Size classes in number of persons employed

nace_r2.label: Statistical classification of economic activities in the European Community (NACE Rev. 2)

label.C10-S951_X_K: All activities (except agriculture, forestry and fishing, and mining and quarrying), without financial sector

label.E_DAOWN: Enterprises where data analytics for the enterprise is performed by own employees
label.E_DASERP: Enterprises perform data analytics on data from transaction records such as sale details, payments records
label.E_DASCRM: Enterprises perform data analytics on data about customers, e.g. purchasing information, location, preferences, customer reviews, searches
label.E_DASSM: Enterprises perform data analytics on data from social media including from enterprises' own social media profiles
label.E_DASWEB: Enterprises perform data analytics on web data
label.E_DASLOC: Enterprises perform data analytics on location data from the use of portable devices or vehicles
label.E_DASSDS: Enterprises perform data analytics on data from smart devices or sensors
label.E_DASGOV: Enterprises perform data analytics on government authorities’ open data
label.E_DASSAT: Enterprises perform data analytics on satellite data
label.E_DASANY: Enterprises perform data analytics on data from any source
label.E_DASGE3: Enterprises perform data analytics on data from at least three sources
label.E_DASANY2: Enterprises perform data analytics on data from any source among E_DASWEB, E_DASLOC, E_DASSDS, E_DASGOV and E_DASSAT
label.E_DASANY_ADS: Enterprises perform data analytics on data from any source and pay to advertise on the internet
label.E_DAEXT: Enterprises where data analytics for the enterprise is performed by external enterprise or organisation
label.E_DA: Data analytics for the enterprise is performed by the enterprise's own employees or by an external provider
label.E_DSELL: Enterprises sell (access to) any of its own data
label.E_DSELLX: Enterprises don't sell (access to) any of its own data
label.E_DASSDS_SELL: Enterprises perform data analytics on data from smart devices or sensors and sell (access to) its own data
label.E_DASLOC_SELL: Enterprises perform data analytics on location data from the use of portable devices and sell (access to) its own data
label.E_DASSM_SELL: Enterprises perform data analytics on data from social media and sell (access to) its own data
label.E_DASWEB_SELL: Enterprises perform data analytics on web data and sell (access to) its own data
label.E_DASSDS_BUY: Enterprises perform data analytics on data from smart devices or sensors and purchased (access to) any data
label.E_DASLOC_BUY: Enterprises perform data analytics on location data from the use of portable devices and purchased (access to) any data
label.E_DASSM_BUY: Enterprises perform data analytics on data from social media and purchased (access to) any data
label.E_DASWEB_BUY: Enterprises perform data analytics on web data and purchased (access to) any data
label.E_DI3_VLO_DASANY: Enterprises with very low digital intensity index, which perform data analytics on data from any source
label.E_DI3_LO_DASANY: Enterprises with low digital intensity index, which perform data analytics on data from any source
label.E_DI3_HI_DASANY: Enterprises with high digital intensity index, which perform data analytics on data from any source
label.E_DI3_VHI_DASANY: Enterprises with very high digital intensity index, which perform data analytics on data from any source
label.E_DI3_VLO_DA: Enterprises with very low digital intensity index, which perform data analytics
label.E_DI3_LO_DA: Enterprises with low digital intensity index, which perform data analytics
label.E_DI3_HI_DA: Enterprises with high digital intensity index, which perform data analytics
label.E_DI3_VHI_DA: Enterprises with very high digital intensity index, which perform data analytics

label.PC_ENT_IUSE: Percentage of enterprises where persons employed have access to the internet
label.PC_ENT_DAOWN: Percentage of enterprises which performed Data Analytics by the enterprise's own employees
